policy.kospi_weight_method: KRX KOSPI issuer MKTCAP / total KOSPI MKTCAP when available
policy.kospi_etf_proxy_policy: EWY/MSCI Korea is diagnostics-only and must not be used as KOSPI RIM weights

notes: Index-weighted direct dividend-yield route; retained with SlickCharts/YF cross-checks in legacy_payout_ratio_qa.
Not an observed index-level payout series; coverage-tagged derived input only.
Not a live index-level consensus field; coverage-tagged derived input only.
No house premium adjustment included in public inputs slice.
FY1 row anchors to benchmark_best_eps; row eps_growth is context-only and not multiplied into earnings_proxy.
FY1 eps_growth is the source-reported analyst growth snapshot; it is base-effect sensitive and is not applied to the FY1 earnings_proxy anchor.
Canonical PEG denominator uses explicit_eps_growth_3y; row eps_growth remains path-growth context.
Scenario input only; no fair value or target price is emitted.
Row eps_growth is applied before this period's earnings_proxy is calculated.
Forward EPS ratio used to roll the prior earnings_proxy into this period.

FY labels are stock_action forward estimate buckets; calendar-year labels require a separate reporting-period contract.
PEG uses derived.explicit_eps_growth_3y as the canonical growth denominator.
FY1 eps_growth is a source-reported context snapshot and is not used to roll earnings_proxy; FY2/FY3 eps_growth values are forward-EPS roll-forward ratios.

payout_ratio.reason: Exact index payout derivation requires named constituent weights and/or index yield coverage.

explicit_eps_growth_3y.reason: Exact index growth derivation requires named constituent weights with sufficient forward EPS coverage.

risk_free_rate.reason: KR10Y source is not present in local 100x macro data and no KRX KTS 10Y bridge source was found.

sources: KRX KTS 10Y benchmark government bond yield
candidate.note: Collect before any public KOSPI RIM output; do not reuse DGS10.

payout_ratio.reason: Exact index payout derivation requires named constituent weights and/or index yield coverage.

explicit_eps_growth_3y.reason: Exact index growth derivation requires named constituent weights with sufficient forward EPS coverage.

notes: Korea forward estimates exist, but KRX KOSPI index weights are required before public KOSPI RIM output.
KOSPI RIM publication still depends on freshness and KRX raw-data terms review.
Fidelity Nasdaq Composite ETF holdings are a proxy candidate only, not official Nasdaq Composite constituent weights.
Top holding coverage is below the primary public-card threshold, so exact CCMP blockers remain.
iShares MSCI South Korea ETF holdings are MSCI Korea ETF holdings, not KOSPI constituent weights.
Do not use EWY for KOSPI RIM when KRX KOSPI market-cap source files are available.
iShares Semiconductor ETF holdings are a proxy candidate only, not literal PHLX Semiconductor Index weights.
High proxy coverage does not remove the SOX identity-mapping blocker.
